column1: # Lagarith residual-RLE decoder LUT — forward (extraction artefact)
# Total entries: 256 (each entry is one little-endian uint32)
# All 256 dword values are <= 255; the table stores a byte-valued
# function in dword-wide cells (storage is 32 bits but the meaningful
# range is byte-sized). The low byte of each dword forms a 256-byte
# permutation. Upper 24 bits of every entry are zero.
